data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a central management view.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Central management view', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of such a view. While the use case mentions the need for a central management view, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a central management view functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for central management view
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the central management view.
